title: Yoga Sutras 3.1-8: Dharana, Dhyana, Samadhi
description: The three inner limbs of yoga: concentration, meditation, and absorption — together called samyama.
introduction: The three inner limbs of yoga: concentration, meditation, and absorption — together called samyama.

translation.text: Dharana is fixing the mind on one point. Dhyana is the continuous flow of awareness. Samadhi is when the object alone shines forth.
